03 / The Centerpiece Moment

BADAS 2.0.
Most important launch in company history.

Best collision prediction model on the planet. Built on VJEPA-2 architecture. Beats Nvidia Cosmos 2 even after fine-tuning on identical data — the smoking gun for world models vs autoregressive approaches. View full launch brief →

BADAS 2.0

300M params / Teacher

94% mAP. State-of-the-art collision prediction. Attention-based visual explainability. Text descriptions. Voice capability. The full model.

BADAS 2.0 Flash

87M params / Real-time

Edge-optimized. Real-time inference on GPU/CPU. Rivals BADAS 1.5 performance at fraction of compute.

BADAS 2.0 Flashlight

22M params / Ultra-Edge

IoT-ready. False alarm prevention specialist. Better than BADAS 1.0 at 1/14th the parameters.

94%
Mean Avg Precision
BADAS 2.0
~79%
Cosmos 2 Fine-Tuned
Same data, worse result
5x
Training Data
200K Nexar videos
3
Model Sizes
300M / 87M / 22M

Launch Narrative

Open challenge positioning: we publish our benchmarks, we invite comparison. Yan LeCun amplification — VJEPA-2 architecture validates his world model thesis. This is the proof that attention-based world models beat autoregressive generation for safety-critical prediction.

New Capabilities

Visual explainability via attention maps — shows exactly what the model sees. Natural language descriptions of predicted events. Voice interface for fleet operators. These are not incremental features, they are category-defining differentiators.

04 / GTM Engines

Six engines, cascaded
into measurable tasks.

Each engine breaks down into specific deliverables, assigned owners, and measurable KPIs. Click to expand.
E1 — Weekly Data Engine
Weekly ▾

One proprietary data drop per week — Event of the Week, rare edge-case insights, Miles to Discovery demonstrations. Distributed across X, LinkedIn, Blog, and Sales Enablement materials.

  • Select and package weekly data insight from Nexar fleetItamar1/week
  • Create visual proof assets (chart, video clip, map)Yoav / Robert3 assets/week
  • Draft blog post with data narrativeItamar1 post/week
  • Create social thread (X + LinkedIn versions)Itamar2 threads/week
  • Build sales enablement one-pager from data dropRobert1 asset/week
  • Schedule and publish across all channelsItamarSame-day publish

E2 — Executive Signal
Weekly ▾

One opinionated, data-anchored leadership insight per week. Rotating voices: Zach (LinkedIn), Eran (X + newsletter), Luc (CR&D), Rui (product). Executive posts crush company pages — Eran at $0.68 CPM, Zach at 3.47% CTR.

  • Draft executive voice post aligned to weekly data dropItamar1/week
  • Coordinate with exec for review and personal touchItamar24h turnaround
  • Publish on exec personal channels (X/LinkedIn)Itamar1/week
  • Eran monthly newsletter: data-driven perspectiveItamar1/month
  • Amplify exec posts with paid ($200-300/post)Itamar>100K reach/post

E3 — Agentic Amplification
Continuous ▾

Visual creation and agentic social amplification. AI-powered content multiplication turns one data drop into multi-channel content. Automated social scheduling, A/B variant testing, and engagement monitoring — increasing output and outreach without increasing headcount.

  • Maintain and optimize agentic content & social workflowsZiv / ItamarResources saved vs. manual
  • Auto-generate social variants from blog contentItamar8-12 variants/drop
  • Create visual proof variations for different channelsZiv / Itamar3 formats/asset
  • Agentic engagement monitoring and response draftingItamarOutreach increased 3x
  • Auto-compile weekly performance dashboardZivWeekly report

Tools & Infrastructure

Social Agentic Efforts — Automated social content generation and scheduling across X, LinkedIn, and newsletter channels. AI-driven A/B variant testing for headlines, visuals, and CTAs. Agentic engagement monitoring with response drafting for high-value interactions.

Agentic Design Tools — Particle Machine (particle-machine.corp.nexars.ai) — internal cloud particle image library with 400+ VERA particle images used across all marketing materials. Agentic design workflows for rapid asset creation: social cards, blog headers, presentation visuals. AI-powered brand consistency enforcement across all outputs.

E4 — Paid Precision
Always-On ▾

$1K/week always-on amplification split across X (reach, $1.14 CPM) and LinkedIn (ABM depth, $4.76 CPM). Amplifies top organic content and saturates target account feeds.

  • Allocate weekly $1K budget across X and LinkedInVlad / Itamar$1K/week spend
  • Boost top-performing organic posts within 24hVlad>2 boosts/week
  • Run ABM targeting campaigns on LinkedInVladReach 50 target accts
  • Weekly performance review and reallocationVlad / ItamarCPM < $5 avg
  • BADAS 2.0 launch burst: 2x spend for 2 weeksVlad / Itamar$2K/week at launch

05 / Channel Architecture

YTD: 5.55M reach on $6.7K.

PR drives 48.6% of impressions at zero cost. Paid channels perform 76-87% below B2B benchmarks. Executive voices crush company pages. $1K/week projects to 50M annual at current efficiency.
$1.14
X CPM
87% below $9 benchmark
$4.76
LinkedIn CPM
76-84% below benchmark
$0.68
Eran X CPM
Best executive voice
3.47%
Zach LinkedIn CTR
Company avg: 0.44%

Projection

$1K/week on X alone = ~3.8M impressions/month at current CPM. Combined with organic reach, PR, LinkedIn, and executive amplification, the 50M annual impression goal is achievable. Strategy: lead with personal voices, amplify with paid.

Recommended Additional Events ▾

Autonomy Summit / Urban Autonomy Summit

Recommended · AV & Mobility Decision-Makers

Proven source — Bot Auto, Strut Motors, May Mobility pipeline originated here. Strong alignment with BADAS 2.0 autonomous vehicle narrative.

CES 2027 (January)

Recommended · Tech Industry Showcase

Pipeline source for Parkopedia, Mitsubishi Electric, Inverted AI, Zelostech. Major visibility for BADAS 2.0 by Jan 2027 with real-world deployment data.

IATR Conference

Recommended · Fleet & Transportation

Pipeline source for CTG (Corporate Transportation Group). Direct access to fleet operators and transportation decision-makers.

Insurance Innovation Forum

Recommended · Insurance & Risk

Target market for BADAS collision prediction. Align with Acko ($12.3M), Cover Whale, Nirvana Insurance pipeline. Insurance vertical is highest-value segment.

Cadence

Weekly: content shipped, paid performance review, pipeline movement tracking. Monthly: forecast vs actual, channel effectiveness, Eran newsletter, exec voice calendar. Quarterly: events pipeline, ABM list, campaign retros, budget reallocation.

The Operating Thesis

Sustained pipeline growth comes from consistency, not campaigns. One weekly data drop, agentic amplification, executive voice rotation, always-on paid. The BADAS 2.0 launch creates the inflection — the weekly cadence compounds the result. Efficiency gains mean a team of 4 executes like a team of 12.

BADAS-powered Risk Index for AV underwriting — independent standard trained on 10B+ miles of real-world human driving data. Pre-bind scoring by corridor and driver type.

AV Players Active

Sender: Evan O'Brien, Dir Enterprise Growth

~160 Companies
60M+ Edge-Case Clips

Real-world driving data from 350K+ AI dashcams — 100M+ miles/month. Long-tail edge cases (collisions, near-misses, VRU, adverse weather) that can't be synthetically generated. Used by NVIDIA, Waymo, Zoox.

Campaign Alignment to Engines

Insurance campaigns (A, D) feed E5 Account Intelligence pipeline. DOT campaigns (B, C) feed E5 + E1 Weekly Data CityStream content. AV Players campaign (E) feeds E5 and generates case studies for E2 Executive Signal. All campaign responses route through HubSpot for E4 Paid Precision retargeting.

Named Account Lists

Full named account lists, ICP definitions, email templates, and target individual spreadsheets maintained in campaign source file. Contact Dean Becker (Insurance), Mark Pawloski (DOT), or Evan O'Brien (AV) for vertical-specific pipeline status.

10 / Budget & Funnel Model

$200K B2B budget.
5-6x funnel coverage.

Working backwards from $20M H2 revenue target. The funnel math is comfortable — the risk is deal quality, not marketing volume.

Total B2B Budget

$200K

Annual marketing spend

Committed

$137.5K

Allocated across programme

Reserve

$62.5K

Flex for bursts + opps

Budget Allocation

Paid media $46.2K · Spark/Seed $2K · Press releases $10K (4x BusinessWire) · Events $24K (Curbivore x4 + 2 conferences) · BADAS demo video $10K · GEO/LLM $3.5K · Analyst relations $6K · Alex Roy V3 $15K · HubSpot $4.8K · Sales Nav $6K · Contingency $10K

Funnel Math

H2 Revenue Target

$20M

To reach $47M combined

Avg Deal Size

$3.2M

AV $4M / Ins $3M / DOT $2M

New Deals Needed

6-7

ex-USPS

Qualified Demos

20-23

At 30% win rate

Net New SALs (H2)

~20-24

After 12 banked convert

H2 MQLs Planned

~490

5-6x coverage of floor

The Verdict

490 H2 MQLs at 28% produces ~137 SALs. We need 20-24 net new. 5-6x coverage. The risk is not volume — it's quality. Demo capacity: 20-23 qualified demos across 4 AEs = 5-6 demos/AE/quarter. Tight but achievable.

$20M H2 Revenue Bridge

SourceOwnerCloseEst. Value
USPS (active negotiation)ZachQ2/Q3$5-15M
GM POC expansionJonQ3$3.5M
Insurance (Cover Whale, Nirvana, AV)EvanQ3-Q4$4M
DOT pipeline (121 targets)MarkQ3-Q4$3M
Named expansions (Acko, NVIDIA, IBM)OrenQ3-Q4$5M
New AV/ADAS logos (BADAS 2.0)Jon / EvanQ4$3M
Curbivore fleet pipelineEoghanQ4$2M

USPS Risk Flag

If USPS ($132M) misses Jun 30, H2 gap: $5-10M. Response: accelerate DOT Direct (121 targets), bring forward expansions, use $62.5K reserve for gov-targeted burst WK 22-26. Decision needed by WK 20.

12 / Content Engine & Investor Arc

15 Wayve pieces. 14 Curl pieces.
One investor argument.

Every piece maps to a pillar and an emotion. The content year proves one thesis: the infrastructure layer for Physical AI is built and it belongs to Nexar.

Three Investor Pillars

P1 — The Trust Vacuum

AI entering the real world trained on data it has never met. $4T industry, synthetic data problem.

Wayve 1, 7, 10, 11 + V-series

P2 — 10-Year Head Start

$4B+ / 4-6yr replication moat. Atlas, cameras, consent architecture.

Wayve 2, 5, 8, 12 + milestones

P3 — Infrastructure Locked

TCP/IP for internet. AWS for cloud. Nexar Vera for Physical AI.

BADAS, Apex, Risk Index, CityStream

Three Emotions

RELIEF — Someone checked. · BELIEF — It learned from us. · WONDER — Look what's possible.

13 / GEO/LLM Searchability

When AI search asks
"who has the best data?" — Nexar.

Generative Engine Optimisation. LLMs cite specific, numerical, verifiable sources. Nexar's content is built for this. $3.5K, compounds indefinitely.

10 Target Queries

QuerySourceStatus
"Best real-world AV training data"nexar-ai.com/researchNot yet
"Collision prediction benchmarks"BADAS benchmark pageNeeds page
"Real-world vs synthetic data AV"Wayve 1WK 13
"Independent AV certification"Nexar ApexNeeds FAQ
"Road risk index insurance"Risk Index + Wayve 4Needs FAQ
"What is BADAS model"BADAS pageNeeds page
"Nexar Atlas data engine"Atlas pageNeeds structure
"Verifying AI meaning"nexar-ai.com/verifyWK 24
"Smart city road intelligence"CityStream + Wayve 6Partial
"How many miles Nexar data"FAQ + researchPartial

GEO Content Rules

1. Citation-ready first sentence: [Claim] + [Number] + [Method] · 2. FAQ on every product page · 3. Published datasets = permanent anchors · 4. arXiv for BADAS 1.5 (3-5x citation rate) · 5. Internal linking to BADAS + Atlas + datasets

Target: 5/10 by WK 26. All 10 by WK 39.

Budget: $3.5K (SurferSEO + citation monitoring + schema markup). Track ChatGPT + Perplexity responses monthly. Tag AI-search inbound in HubSpot.

Channel Adjustments

+YouTube BADAS demo on YouTube (zero cost, LLM-indexed) · +Podcasts 4-6 exec appearances (Lex Fridman, Latent Space, Acquired — zero cost) · LinkedIn retargeting H2 shift $100/wk from X → LinkedIn retargeting on site visitors (3x SAL rate)
